cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Leslie could have gone to the beach. First, the beach was closed after 10pm. From 9pm to 10pm: walking to the Statue of Liberty. What about the gaps between these times? So during that time, Leslie could have gone to the beach. Also, the beach is open until 10pm, and the next activity is at 9pm, so Leslie couldn't have been at the beach from 9pm to 10pm because they were walking towards the statue then.
